ogTitle: Swanport vs Swede Flat: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Swanport and Swede Flat.
heading: Swanport vs Swede Flat — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Swanport, South Australia and Swede Flat, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Swanport has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Swede Flat (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Swanport or Swede Flat safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Swanport has a flood risk score of 56/100, while Swede Flat scores 47/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Swanport scores 20/100 for bushfire risk. Swede Flat scores 65/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Swanport or Swede Flat?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Swanport has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.88% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
